Terry Mulholland

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Left

6-3, 200lb (190cm, 90kg)

Born: March 9, 1963 in Uniontown, PA us

Draft: Drafted by the San Francisco Giants in the 1st round (24th) of the 1984 MLB June Amateur Draft from Marietta College (Marietta, OH).

High School: Laurel Highlands HS (Uniontown, PA)

School: Marietta College (Marietta, OH)

Debut: June 8, 1986 (Age 23-091d, 15,177th in major league history)
   vs. CIN 7.1 IP, 5 H, 6 SO, 3 BB, 1 ER

Last Game: June 3, 2006 (Age 43-086d)
   vs. ATL 0.0 IP, 1 H, 0 SO, 0 BB, 1 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 1986 season

Agents: Joe Bick

Full Name: Terence John Mulholland

Nicknames: Mo

Pronunciation: \mul-HOLLAND\

View Player Info from the B-R Bullpen

  • 1x All-Star

Fielding stats are a combination of official records and Retrosheet records. Both are likely to have substantial errors and will not match perfectly. (See data coverage details)

Mike Lacy sponsor(s) this page.

Sung to the tune of "Hail to the Redskins": Terry Mulholland-The best pitcher in the league! Terry Mulholland-If you face him, you'll feel besieged. Terry Mulholland-You won't get a hit, no way. Terry Mullholland-If you face him, you'll get a K!

A history of the Sports Reference Sponsorship System

Appearances on Leaderboards, Awards, and Honors

Hall of Fame Statistics

Similarity Scores

  • Explanation of Similarity Scores

Transactions

Salaries

  • Salaries may not be complete (especially pre-1985) and may not include some earned bonuses

Name + "Statistics" Translations

  • Note, this is done in an automated way, so we apologize for any errors, & please report any suggested corrections. "Statistics" is included to allow non-English speakers to find our pages.

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Terry Mulholland?

Terry Mulholland is 62 years old.

When was Terry Mulholland born?

Terry Mulholland was born on March 9, 1963.

Where was Terry Mulholland born?

Terry Mulholland was born in Uniontown, PA.

How tall is Terry Mulholland?

Terry Mulholland is 6-3 (190 cm) tall.

How much did Terry Mulholland weigh when playing?

Terry Mulholland weighed 200 lbs (90 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Terry Mulholland play?

Terry Mulholland played 20 seasons.

Is Terry Mulholland in the Hall of Fame?

Terry Mulholland has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

When was Terry Mulholland drafted?

Terry Mulholland was drafted by the San Francisco Giants in the 1st round (24th) of the 1984 MLB June Amateur Draft from Marietta College (Marietta, OH).

What position did Terry Mulholland play?

Terry Mulholland was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Terry Mulholland have?

Terry Mulholland had 1,325 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Terry Mulholland played for?

Terry Mulholland played for 11 teams; the Arizona Diamondbacks, Atlanta Braves, Chicago Cubs, Cleveland Indians, Los Angeles Dodgers, Minnesota Twins, New York Yankees, Philadelphia Phillies, Pittsburgh Pirates, Seattle Mariners and San Francisco Giants.

How many World Series has Terry Mulholland won?

Terry Mulholland has never won a World Series.

When did Terry Mulholland retire?

Terry Mulholland last played in 2006.

What are Terry Mulholland's nicknames?

Mo is a nickname for Terry Mulholland.
